channel.title: Will's Sports Analytics
channel.description: Recent content on Will's Sports Analytics

item.title: Strokes Gained: Why It's the Best Stat in Sports
item.description: Strokes Gained is the cleanest sport-wide measurement framework in professional sports. Here’s the math behind it and how I’m using it to build a course-fit model.

item.title: Expected Points Added: The NFL's Most Useful Model
item.description: EPA is the backbone of modern NFL analytics. Here’s how it works, where it breaks down, and how I’m using it as an input to a play-calling tendency model.

item.title: Expected Goals in Hockey: Building xG from Shot Data
item.description: Expected goals models have transformed hockey analytics. Here’s how to build a basic xG model from publicly available shot data and what its limitations are.
